items.title_zh: 英伟达开源 TwoTower AI 模型：保留 98.7% 质量，Token 生成提速 2.42 倍
items.title_en: NVIDIA Open-Sources TwoTower AI Model: Retains 98.7% Quality, 2.42x Faster Token Generation
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 3 日消息，英伟达昨日（7 月 2 日）发布博文，宣布推出 Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower，是一种基于预训练自回归骨干网络的离散扩散语言模型， 致力于解决大模型 Token 生成速度瓶颈。 在开源方面，该模型以开源权重形式在 Huggingface 平台发布，授权协议为 NVIDIA Nemotron Open Model License。 参数方面，该模型总参数为 60B，采用双塔（TwoTower）架构，包括 30B 的自回归模型（AR）/context Tower 和 30B 的扩散 / 降噪 Tower，每个 Tower 激活 3B 模型，128 个可路由专家。 架构方面，TwoTower 最大的亮点，在于拆分传统扩散语言模型中的网络任务，将文本生成任务中的上下文表示与去噪过程分离到两个独立的神经网络“塔”中。 其中一个塔（上下文塔）保持冻结，专注于维护文本的自回归上下文；另一个塔（去噪器塔）经过训练，负责对噪声块进行去噪，两个塔通过逐层交叉注意力连接协作。 性能方面，英伟达表示从综合基准测试质量来看，双塔架构保留 98.7% 的质量表现，但是实际运行时间吞吐量提高了 2.42 倍。IT之家附上相关测试结果如下： 任务 Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (AR) Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower (diffusion…
items.summary_en: NVIDIA open-sourced the Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower model, a discrete diffusion language model with a 60B-parameter two-tower architecture. It retains 98.7% quality while achieving 2.42x faster token generation throughput.
items.why_zh: 该模型通过创新的双塔架构显著提升了生成速度，同时保持高质量，为大规模语言模型的部署效率提供了重要突破。
items.why_en: This model significantly improves generation speed via a novel two-tower architecture while maintaining high quality, offering a key breakthrough in deployment efficiency for large language models.

items.title_zh: 汪滔：Meta 下一代 AI 模型“西瓜”已追上 GPT-5.5
items.title_en: Meta AI Head Says Next-Gen Model 'Watermelon' Matches GPT-5.5
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 3 日消息，据《商业内幕》今天（3 日）报道，Meta 超级智能业务负责人汪滔向员工透露，Meta 在 AI 模型竞赛中取得了重要进展。 两名知情人士称，汪滔在内部全员大会上披露，Meta 下一代 AI 模型 Watermelon（西瓜）已在备受关注的基准测试中 追平 OpenAI 旗舰模型 GPT-5.5 ，不过没有说明具体采用了哪些测试项目。 一名知情人士称，汪滔在会上表示：“Watermelon 是 Avocado（鳄梨 / 牛油果）之后的下一代模型，目前仍在训练。Watermelon 使用的算力比 Avocado 高出一个数量级。” 汪滔还在 X 上公开提及这项进展，称 Muse Spark 很快将迎来更新，编程和智能体能力会大幅提升，目标是缩小与竞争对手模型的差距。有用户询问 Meta 何时能推出比肩 Anthropic Claude Opus 的编程模型，汪滔回答：“ 很快。你们会喜欢我们接下来拿出的成果 。” 如果汪滔的判断准确，将意味着 Meta 的巨额投入和扎克伯格激进的人才争夺开始见效。不过，AI 模型竞赛仍在高速推进，领先位置也可能迅速变化。 OpenAI 今年 4 月发布了性能强大的 GPT-5.5。上月底，OpenAI 又推出 迄今性能最强的 GPT-5.6 ，但应美国政府要求，暂未向公众全面开放。 Meta 在 4 月发布 Muse S…
items.summary_en: Meta's AI head Wang Tao disclosed that the next-gen model 'Watermelon' has matched OpenAI's GPT-5.5 in benchmarks. The model is still in training and uses an order of magnitude more compute than its predecessor.
items.why_zh: 这表明Meta在AI模型竞赛中取得重大进展，可能改变当前由OpenAI主导的格局，但领先地位仍不确定。
items.why_en: This signals Meta's significant progress in the AI model race, potentially shifting the current OpenAI-dominated landscape, though leadership remains uncertain.

items.title_zh: 韩国将放开用于AI学习的个人信息使用限制
items.title_en: The latch of personal information used for artificial intelligence (AI) learning will be released. O..
items.summary_zh: 据《每日经济新闻》报道，韩国计划放开用于人工智能学习的个人信息使用限制。具体措施尚未详细披露，但此举旨在促进AI技术的发展，同时平衡隐私保护。该政策可能允许在更广泛的范围内使用个人数据训练AI模型，但需遵守相关法规。
items.summary_en: The latch of personal information used for artificial intelligence (AI) learning will be released. O.. 매일경제
items.why_zh: 该政策可能加速韩国AI产业发展，但需关注隐私保护与数据使用的平衡。
items.why_en: This policy could accelerate South Korea's AI industry growth, but the balance between privacy and data use remains critical.

items.title_zh: 阿里腾讯等加入快手旗下可灵AI首轮20亿美元融资
items.title_en: Alibaba, Tencent Join Kuaishou's Kling AI in $2 Billion First-Round Funding
items.summary_zh: 阿里腾讯等加入快手旗下可灵AI首轮20亿美元融资 联合早报
items.summary_en: Alibaba and Tencent have joined Kuaishou's Kling AI in a $2 billion first-round funding round, highlighting strong market interest in AI video generation.
items.why_zh: 这笔巨额融资表明AI视频生成领域竞争激烈，快手可灵AI获得顶级投资者支持，有望加速技术迭代。
items.why_en: This massive funding round underscores fierce competition in AI video generation, with Kuaishou's Kling AI gaining top investor support to accelerate development.

items.title_zh: 中国发布全球首个地层学 AI 大模型，给地球建“共享数据库”
items.title_en: China Releases World's First Stratigraphy AI Model, Building a Shared Database for Earth's 4.6-Billion-Year History
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 3 日消息，据央视新闻报道，在今日的第五届国际地层学大会上，中国科学家面向全球发布了 首个地层学 AI 大模型 及智能全球地层剖面对比系统等新工具。 这意味着，地球 46 亿年的演化历史将首次拥有一个 全球共享的数据库 。 地层学是解读地球演化历史的基础学科，可以为人类认识生命起源、资源分布、气候演变提供核心科学依据。 中国科学院院士、国际地层委员会副主席沈树忠介绍，希望通过时间轴和全球大数据的方式， 能够把地球 46 亿年历史的所有地质记录，按照统一的时间标准进行排序 。 中国在地层学领域拥有很强的硬实力。目前，我国已发现 11 颗“金钉子”，也就是全球界线层型剖面和点位，数量稳居世界前列。这些“金钉子”的发现，为地球的演化历史标定了国际通用的“刻度”，给全球地质研究提供了统一的参照系。 IT之家查询获悉，据昆山市人民政府官网介绍，6 月 29 日，第五届国际地层学大会在江苏昆山拉开帷幕， 这是 国际地层委员会 旗舰会议自创办以来首次走出欧洲、落地亚洲 。 本届大会为期 5 天，由国际地层委员会主办，南京大学承办，中国科学院南京地质古生物研究所、中国地质大学（武汉）、苏州深时数字地球研究中心等单位合办，来自加拿大、德国、美国、俄罗斯、英国、法国、澳大利亚等 33 个国家的 700 余名专家学者参加。
items.summary_en: At the 5th International Congress on Stratigraphy, Chinese scientists unveiled the world's first stratigraphy AI model and an intelligent global stratigraphic correlation system. The model aims to sort all geological records of Earth's 4.6-billion-year history by a unified time standard, creating a globally shared database. China has discovered 11 'golden spikes' (Global Stratotype Sections and Points), providing an international reference for geological research.
items.why_zh: 这是全球首个地层学AI大模型，标志着中国在地层学领域引领国际标准，为地球演化历史研究提供了革命性的数字化工具。
items.why_en: This is the world's first stratigraphy AI model, marking China's leadership in international stratigraphic standards and providing a revolutionary digital tool for studying Earth's evolutionary history.

items.title_zh: 中国发布全球首个地层学 AI 大模型，给地球建“共享数据库”
items.title_en: China Launches World's First Stratigraphy AI Model, Building a Shared Database for Earth
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 3 日消息，据央视新闻报道，在今日的第五届国际地层学大会上，中国科学家面向全球发布了 首个地层学 AI 大模型 及智能全球地层剖面对比系统等新工具。 这意味着，地球 46 亿年的演化历史将首次拥有一个 全球共享的数据库 。 地层学是解读地球演化历史的基础学科，可以为人类认识生命起源、资源分布、气候演变提供核心科学依据。 中国科学院院士、国际地层委员会副主席沈树忠介绍，希望通过时间轴和全球大数据的方式， 能够把地球 46 亿年历史的所有地质记录，按照统一的时间标准进行排序 。 中国在地层学领域拥有很强的硬实力。目前，我国已发现 11 颗“金钉子”，也就是全球界线层型剖面和点位，数量稳居世界前列。这些“金钉子”的发现，为地球的演化历史标定了国际通用的“刻度”，给全球地质研究提供了统一的参照系。 IT之家查询获悉，据昆山市人民政府官网介绍，6 月 29 日，第五届国际地层学大会在江苏昆山拉开帷幕， 这是 国际地层委员会 旗舰会议自创办以来首次走出欧洲、落地亚洲 。 本届大会为期 5 天，由国际地层委员会主办，南京大学承办，中国科学院南京地质古生物研究所、中国地质大学（武汉）、苏州深时数字地球研究中心等单位合办，来自加拿大、德国、美国、俄罗斯、英国、法国、澳大利亚等 33 个国家的 700 余名专家学者参加。
items.summary_en: China unveiled the world's first stratigraphy AI model at the 5th International Congress on Stratigraphy, aiming to create a global shared database of Earth's 4.6-billion-year history. The model standardizes geological records by time.
items.why_zh: 该模型为地球演化历史提供了统一的时间标尺，将极大推动全球地质研究和资源勘探。
items.why_en: This model provides a unified time scale for Earth's history, significantly advancing global geological research and resource exploration.

items.title_zh: 空间支撑重要性：几何感知图融合用于降雨场重建
items.title_en: Spatial Support Matters: Geometry-Aware Graph Fusion for Rainfall Field Reconstruction
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出一种几何感知图融合方法，用于解决降雨场重建中不同测量设备（如雨量计、微波链路、雷达/卫星产品）因空间支撑差异（点、路径、网格区域）导致的数据融合问题。现有异构图方法在特征空间融合数据时忽略了测量支撑的几何约束。新方法通过考虑几何信息，有望提高城市洪水建模中精细尺度降雨重建的准确性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01621v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Fine-scale rainfall reconstruction is critical for urban flood modeling, but real rainfall sensing systems observe the field through incompatible spatial supports: gauges measure points, microwave links measure paths, and radar/satellite products measure gridded areas. These differences in measurement support impose geometrically distinct constraints on the rainfall field, yet existing heterogeneous graph approaches reconcile such sources in feature space, giving each its own embedding while discarding the geometry of its support. We propose a ge…
items.why_zh: 该方法解决了降雨数据融合中因测量支撑几何差异导致的精度损失问题，对城市洪水预警和建模具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This method addresses accuracy loss due to geometric differences in measurement supports, which is crucial for urban flood warning and modeling.

items.title_zh: 分离专家保留与自主源推断：无原始ECG回放的持续ECG部署
items.title_en: Separating Expert Retention from Autonomous Source Inference in Raw-ECG-Replay-Free Continual ECG Deployment
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了在多源心电图（ECG）部署中，当无法保留或回放原始ECG数据时，模型如何整合新数据源。提出一种增量专家库方法，基于冻结的1024维ECGFounder特征，为每个新域添加一个平衡softmax线性专家，同时训练一个轻量级路由器在源元数据不可用时选择专家。该方法避免了参数干扰，实现了持续学习。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01674v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In multi-source ECG deployment, models may need to incorporate new data sources when earlier raw ECGs cannot be retained or replayed. Freezing a pretrained backbone and assigning each source an isolated classifier prevents parameter interference, but deployment still requires selecting an expert when source metadata are unavailable. We study this distinction through \ours{}, an incremental expert bank built on frozen 1024-dimensional ECGFounder features. Each arriving domain adds a balanced-softmax linear expert, while a lightweight router is fit…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了ECG持续部署中数据隐私和存储限制下的模型更新问题，对医疗AI的长期部署至关重要。
items.why_en: This research addresses model updating under data privacy and storage constraints in ECG deployment, which is critical for long-term medical AI deployment.

items.title_zh: 金融服务LLM评估的元基准
items.title_en: Meta-Benchmarks for Financial-Services LLM Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出一个元基准框架，用于评估大语言模型在金融服务领域的特定认知能力。现有公共排行榜优化全局平均性能，无法捕捉金融工作的特定需求（如文档合规推理、多轮客户交互）。该框架将452个公开基准组织成41个O*NET通用工作活动，并聚合到38个BIAN银行业务领域，涵盖销售、运营、风险和支持工作。通过多任务评估，更准确地衡量模型在金融场景中的表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01740v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Public LLM leaderboards optimise for global average performance and do not capture the specific cognitive demands of financial-services work: a model that leads on MMLU-Pro may underperform on document-grounded compliance reasoning, and a coding leader may handle multi-turn customer interactions poorly. We present a meta-benchmarking framework that organises 452 publicly reported benchmarks into 41 O*NET Generalized Work Activities and aggregates those into 38 BIAN banking business domains spanning sales, operations, risk, and support work. A mul…
items.why_zh: 该框架填补了金融领域LLM评估的空白，确保模型在合规、风险等关键任务上的安全性和准确性。
items.why_en: This framework fills the gap in LLM evaluation for finance, ensuring safety and accuracy in critical tasks like compliance and risk.

items.title_zh: Pre-Flight：评估大语言模型航空运营知识的基准
items.title_en: Pre-Flight: A Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Aviation Operational Knowledge
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出Pre-Flight，一个开源基准测试，包含300道多选题，涵盖国际标准和机场地面运营材料，评估大语言模型在航空运营知识上的安全性和正确性。通用基准无法衡量模型在航空特定领域的推理能力，而航空领域的高风险性使得这一差距至关重要。Pre-Flight旨在为航空业务应用（如文档生成、培训、客户助手）提供可靠的模型评估工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01829v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed for aviation business operations, from documentation and training generation to customer facing assistants. General purpose benchmarks do not measure whether a model reasons safely and correctly about aviation specific operational knowledge, and the high stakes, regulated nature of the domain makes that gap consequential. We present Pre-Flight, an open source benchmark of 300 multiple choice questions drawn from international standards and airport ground operations material, covering internat…
items.why_zh: 该基准为航空领域LLM应用提供了必要的安全评估工具，确保模型在关键操作中的可靠性。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides a necessary safety assessment tool for LLM applications in aviation, ensuring reliability in critical operations.

items.title_zh: A-TMA：解耦长期智能体记忆中的状态感知记忆故障
items.title_en: A-TMA: Decoupling State-Aware Memory Failures in Long-Term Agent Memory
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了长期记忆中“幽灵记忆”问题，即旧、当前和过渡事实在记忆库中混合，导致检索时误导答案模型。提出A-TMA，一种状态感知覆盖层，从三个层面优化记忆系统：记忆库维护、检索和答案时间解析。通过解耦状态协调失败，提高LLM智能体作为持久助手的准确性，特别是在用户事实变化时。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01935v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long term memory lets LLM agents act as persistent assistants, but user facts change. A useful memory system must know what is true now, what used to be true, and what changed. We study \emph{ghost memory}, a state coordination failure in which old, current, and transition facts coexist in the memory bank, remain mixed during retrieval, and mislead the answer model. We argue that memory systems should be understood and optimized from three levels: bank maintenance, retrieval, and answer time resolution. We propose ATMA, a state aware overlay for…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了长期记忆中事实状态混淆的关键问题，对构建可靠的持久智能体至关重要。
items.why_en: This research addresses the critical issue of fact state confusion in long-term memory, essential for building reliable persistent agents.

items.title_zh: A²utoLPBench：通过逆KKT构造自动生成的智能体友好型LP基准
items.title_en: A$^{2}$utoLPBench: An Auto-Generated, Agent-Friendly LP Benchmark via Inverse-KKT Construction
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出A²utoLPBench，一个自动生成的线性规划（LP）文本问题基准，用于测试LLM驱动的智能体。传统LP文本基准是静态数据集，大小和难度固定，且可能泄露到训练数据中。新方法通过先选择可行点和其对偶，然后构造一个使该点最优且目标值已知的问题，从而保证答案已知且无泄漏。该基准可无限生成新问题，适应不同难度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.02141v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Most LP-from-text benchmarks are static datasets of word problems written and labeled by hand. Once such a dataset is released, its size is fixed, its difficulty is fixed, and every problem can leak into the training data of future LLMs. We present \textbf{A$^{2}$utoLPBench}, a benchmark for testing LLM-driven agents on linear programming problems written in plain text. We first pick a feasible point and dual, then write down a problem for which that point is optimal and the objective value is known. The answer is known by construction, with no s…
items.why_zh: 该基准解决了静态数据集的数据泄漏和难度固定问题，为LLM智能体在数学推理任务上提供更可靠的评估。
items.why_en: This benchmark addresses data leakage and fixed difficulty in static datasets, providing more reliable evaluation for LLM agents on mathematical reasoning tasks.

items.title_zh: Copewell：用于公平心理健康支持的多智能体群体架构
items.title_en: Copewell: A Multi-Agent Swarm Architecture for Equitable Mental Wellness Support
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出Copewell，一种多智能体群体系统，旨在扩大心理健康支持的可及性。全球近10亿人受心理健康障碍影响，但中低收入国家75%的患者因劳动力短缺、成本障碍和污名化而得不到治疗。现有AI解决方案多为单一模式对话界面，放弃率高且无法提供可测量的即时缓解。Copewell通过多智能体协作，根据用户动态情绪状态提供个性化支持，有望改善心理健康服务的公平性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.02245v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mental health disorders affect nearly one billion people globally, yet 75% of individuals in low- and middle-income countries receive no treatment due to workforce shortages, cost barriers, and stigma. Current AI-powered wellness solutions predominantly rely on single-mode conversational interfaces that suffer high abandonment rates and fail to provide measurable, immediate relief calibrated to users' dynamic emotional states. This paper presents Copewell, a novel multi-agent swarm system designed to expand access to mental wellness support throu…
items.why_zh: 该研究针对全球心理健康治疗缺口，提出创新的多智能体解决方案，有望显著提升心理健康服务的可及性和公平性。
items.why_en: This research addresses the global mental health treatment gap with an innovative multi-agent solution, potentially improving accessibility and equity of mental wellness support.

items.title_zh: 大型语言模型使用的实践审计框架：集体经验主义、伪理性认知与AI生成内容治理
items.title_en: A Practice Auditing Framework for Large Language Model Use: Collective Empiricism, Pseudo-Rational Cognition, and Governance of AI-Generated Content
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型越来越多地用于知识获取、代码生成、学术写作和基于智能体的自动化。在这些场景中，用户可能在没有足够领域实践的情况下获得高度结构化的答案、计划和判断。本文提出了一个针对LLM使用和AI生成内容治理的实践审计框架。该框架引入了“集体经验主义”来描述LLM如何将大规模人类经验压缩和重组为看似经验性和理性的输出，以及“伪理性认知”来描述用户如何误认为这些输出是经过严格推理的。该框架旨在帮助识别和缓解LLM使用中的认知风险，并为AI生成内容的治理提供指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01248v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used for knowledge acquisition, code generation, academic writing, and agent-based automation. In these settings, users may obtain highly structured answers, plans, and judgments without sufficient domain practice. This paper proposes a practice auditing framework for LLM use and AI-generated content governance. It introduces collective empiricism to describe how LLMs compress and reorganize large-scale human experience into outputs that appear empirical and rational, and pseudo-rational cognition to descr…
items.why_zh: 该框架为理解和治理LLM使用中的认知偏差提供了理论基础，对确保AI生成内容的可靠性和负责任使用具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This framework provides a theoretical basis for understanding and governing cognitive biases in LLM use, crucial for ensuring reliability and responsible use of AI-generated content.

items.title_zh: MMBench-Live：持续演进的多模态模型基准
items.title_en: MMBench-Live: A Continuously Evolving Benchmark for Multimodal Models
items.summary_zh: 评估基准对于评估视觉语言模型（VLM）至关重要，但大多数多模态基准是静态的，容易受到时间过时、数据污染和维护成本高的影响。本文提出了MMBench-Live，一个由多智能体驱动的自动化流水线构建的持续演进的多模态基准。该框架将基准演进视为任务导向的数据集构建，集成了结构化基准规范、反馈控制的实时数据采集和可验证的问答生成。MMBench-Live能够动态更新测试样本，以反映最新知识和场景，从而更准确地评估VLM的真实能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01813v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Evaluation benchmarks are essential for assessing vision-language models (VLMs), but most multimodal benchmarks are static, making them vulnerable to temporal staleness, data contamination, and costly maintenance. We present MMBench-Live, a continuously evolving multimodal benchmark built by a multi-agent-driven automated pipeline. Our framework treats benchmark evolution as task-guided dataset construction, integrating structured benchmark specification, feedback-controlled real-time data acquisition, and verifiable QA generation with executab…
items.why_zh: 持续演进的基准能够更真实地反映模型在动态环境中的表现，避免静态基准的过时和污染问题，对推动多模态模型研究至关重要。
items.why_en: A continuously evolving benchmark better reflects model performance in dynamic environments, avoiding staleness and contamination, which is crucial for advancing multimodal model research.

items.title_zh: 混合并行：面向混合专家模型的内存高效训练栈
items.title_en: Mixture-of-Parallelisms: Towards Memory-Efficient Training Stack for Mixture-of-Experts Models
items.summary_zh: 本文展示了一种针对混合专家（MoE）模型的内存高效训练栈。该训练范式结合并专门化了MoE模型训练流程中不同层和阶段的多种现有和新颖的并行技术。它利用这些技术在CPU、CPU内存、GPU HBM内存以及CPU-GPU、GPU-GPU和节点间通信带宽的物理约束下实现最大效率。该栈还包含一种针对优化器状态的新型策略，进一步减少内存占用。该方法旨在使MoE模型的训练更加高效和可扩展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01844v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper showcases a memory-efficient training stack for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. It is a training paradigm that combines and specializes various existing and novel parallelism techniques at different layers and stages of the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model training pipeline. It leverages these techniques to achieve maximal efficiency given the physical constraints of CPU, CPU memory, GPU HBM memory, and the CPU-GPU, GPU-GPU, and node-node communication bandwidth of the GPU cluster. It also contains a novel strategy for the optimizer s…
items.why_zh: 该训练栈通过优化内存使用和并行策略，显著降低了MoE模型的训练成本，有助于推动大规模稀疏模型的实际部署。
items.why_en: This training stack significantly reduces the cost of training MoE models by optimizing memory usage and parallelism, facilitating practical deployment of large-scale sparse models.

items.title_zh: LACUNA：评估LLM遗忘定位精度的测试平台
items.title_en: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型会记忆敏感训练数据，包括个人身份信息（PII），因此需要可靠的后期移除方法。遗忘学习已成为一种有前景的解决方案，最先进的方法通常遵循“先定位、后遗忘”的范式，针对特定模型参数。然而，现有基准仅在输出层面评估遗忘效果，未回答遗忘是否真正从模型参数中擦除了知识，还是仅仅掩盖了它。本文提出了LACUNA，一个用于评估LLM遗忘中定位精度的测试平台，通过细粒度的参数级分析来验证遗忘的真实效果。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.02513v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLMs memorize sensitive training data, including personally identifiable information (PII), creating a pressing need for reliable post hoc removal methods. Unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, with state-of-the-art(SOTA) methods often following a localize-first, unlearn-second paradigm that targets specific model parameters. However, existing benchmarks evaluate unlearning solely at the output level, leaving open the question of whether unlearning truly erases knowledge from a model's parameters or merely obfuscates it, a concern rei…
items.why_zh: 该测试平台填补了LLM遗忘评估中参数级验证的空白，有助于开发更可靠的遗忘方法，保护隐私数据。
items.why_en: This testbed fills the gap in parameter-level verification of LLM unlearning, aiding the development of more reliable unlearning methods for privacy protection.

items.title_zh: BuilderBench：智能体的构建模块
items.title_en: BuilderBench: The Building Blocks of Intelligent Agents
items.summary_zh: 当前的AI模型主要通过模仿和精炼来学习，因此难以解决超出现有数据限制的问题。为了应对新问题，智能体应通过探索和经验学习来获取技能。寻找可扩展的学习机制来开发通过交互学习的智能体仍然是一个重大开放问题。本文介绍了BuilderBench，一个旨在加速以开放式探索为中心的智能体训练研究的基准。BuilderBench要求智能体在复杂环境中通过构建和操作来完成任务，从而促进其学习和适应能力的发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.06288v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Today's AI models learn primarily through mimicry and refining, so it is not surprising that they struggle to solve problems beyond the limits set by existing data. To solve novel problems, agents should acquire skills by exploring and learning through experience. Finding a scalable learning mechanism for developing agents that learn through interaction remains a major open problem. In this work, we introduce BuilderBench, a benchmark to accelerate research into agent training that centers open-ended exploration. BuilderBench requires agents…
items.why_zh: 该基准推动智能体从模仿学习转向探索式学习，对实现通用人工智能和解决新颖问题具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark shifts agent learning from mimicry to exploration, crucial for achieving general AI and solving novel problems.

items.title_zh: 小模型的μ缩放：有原则的热启动和超参数迁移
items.title_en: $\mu$pscaling small models: Principled warm starts and hyperparameter transfer
items.summary_zh: 现代大规模神经网络通常以多种尺寸训练和发布，以适应不同的推理预算。为了提高效率，最近的工作探索了模型放大：从训练好的小模型初始化大模型以加速收敛。然而，这种方法可能对超参数敏感，需要在目标放大模型尺寸上调整超参数，而直接调整成本过高。目前尚不清楚在小模型上调整超参数并通过缩放定律外推是否合理。本文研究了小模型的μ缩放，提出了有原则的热启动和超参数迁移方法，旨在使模型放大更加可靠和高效。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.10545v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Modern large-scale neural networks are often trained and released in multiple sizes to accommodate diverse inference budgets. To improve efficiency, recent work has explored model upscaling: initializing larger models from trained smaller ones to accelerate convergence. However, this method can be sensitive to hyperparameters that need to be tuned at the target upscaled model size, which is prohibitively costly to do directly. It remains unclear whether tuning hyperparameters on smaller models and extrapolating via scaling laws is sound…
items.why_zh: 该研究为模型放大提供了理论指导，降低了超参数调优成本，有助于高效训练不同规模的模型。
items.why_en: This work provides theoretical guidance for model upscaling, reducing hyperparameter tuning costs and enabling efficient training of models at various scales.

items.title_zh: FED-FSTQ：面向边缘设备上LLM联邦微调的Fisher引导令牌量化
items.title_en: FED-FSTQ: Fisher-Guided Token Quantization for Communication-Efficient Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs on Edge Devices
items.summary_zh: 联邦微调为在边缘设备上适配大型语言模型（LLM）而不集中私有数据提供了实用途径。然而，在移动部署中，训练时间通常受限于异构带宽、间歇参与和非独立同分布客户端数据下的上行通信瓶颈。尽管参数高效微调（PEFT）方法如LoRA和QLoRA减少了本地内存和可训练参数，但适配器更新的重复传输仍然是主要瓶颈。本文提出FED-FSTQ，一种Fisher引导的令牌量化方法，通过量化通信中的令牌来减少传输量，同时保持模型性能，从而实现通信高效的联邦微调。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.25421v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Federated fine-tuning provides a practical route to adapt large language models (LLMs) on edge devices without centralizing private data. However, in mobile deployments, the training wall-clock is often dominated by straggler-limited uplink communication under heterogeneous bandwidth, intermittent participation, and non-IID client data. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods such as LoRA and QLoRA reduce local memory and trainable parameters, repeated transmission of adapter updates remains a major bottleneck. We propos…
items.why_zh: 该方法显著降低了联邦微调中的通信成本，使得在资源受限的边缘设备上部署LLM更加可行。
items.why_en: This method significantly reduces communication costs in federated fine-tuning, making LLM deployment on resource-constrained edge devices more feasible.

items.title_zh: SPADER：面向多答案问答的逐步同伴优势与多样性感知探索奖励
items.title_en: SPADER: Step-wise Peer Advantage with Diversity-Aware Exploration Rewards for Multi-Answer Question Answering
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型越来越多地被部署为工具增强的智能体，以获取参数知识之外的信息。虽然最近的工作改进了长程工具使用推理，但大多数方法专注于具有单一正确答案的任务。然而，许多现实查询需要发现一组全面的有效答案，即多答案问答。这种设置带来了两个挑战：长搜索轨迹上的细粒度信用分配，以及超越简单高奖励答案的持续探索的奖励对齐。本文提出SPADER，一种逐步同伴优势与多样性感知探索奖励的方法，通过鼓励探索多样化的答案路径来提升多答案问答的性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00593v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as tool-augmented agents to acquire information beyond parametric knowledge. While recent work has improved long-horizon tool-use reasoning, most approaches focus on tasks with a single correct answer. In contrast, many real-world queries require discovering a comprehensive set of valid answers, a setting known as Multi-Answer QA. This setting raises two challenges: fine-grained credit assignment over long search trajectories and reward alignment for sustained exploration beyond easy high-…
items.why_zh: 该方法填补了多答案问答场景中探索和信用分配的空白，提升了LLM在复杂查询中的全面回答能力。
items.why_en: This method fills the gap in exploration and credit assignment for multi-answer QA, enhancing LLMs' ability to provide comprehensive answers to complex queries.

items.title_zh: WARP：通过权重空间分析恢复训练数据组合
items.title_en: WARP: Weight-Space Analysis for Recovering Training Data Portfolios
items.summary_zh: arXiv 论文提出 WARP 方法，通过分析模型权重空间来推断训练数据的领域混合权重。基础模型通常公开发布，但训练数据配方（如不同来源的采样比例）很少披露，导致研究者无法了解训练分布。现有成员推断方法只能检测单个样本，无法刻画训练语料的全局组成。WARP 旨在填补这一空白，从权重中恢复数据组合信息。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01686v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Foundation models are routinely released to the public, yet the data recipes used to train them -- such as domain mixture weights that determine how different sources are sampled -- are rarely disclosed. This creates an access asymmetry: researchers study the resulting models but lack visibility into the training distribution that produces them. Prior works for inferring training data, such as membership inference, detect at the level of individual samples and thus cannot characterize the global composition of the training corpus. We introduce WA…
items.why_zh: 该方法首次从权重空间推断训练数据全局组成，有助于提升模型透明度与可解释性。
items.why_en: This method enables global training data composition inference from weights, enhancing model transparency and interpretability.

items.title_zh: 重新思考语义分割中的事后校准
items.title_en: Rethinking Post-Hoc Calibration in Semantic Segmentation
items.summary_zh: arXiv 论文指出语义分割中事后校准存在结构性问题。可靠置信度在安全关键场景至关重要，但现代分割模型常校准不佳。事后校准无需重新训练即可修正置信度，但在密集预测中存在被忽视的结构问题，例如对所有 logits 加常数不影响 softmax 概率，但会破坏校准。论文研究了两个此类问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.01902v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reliable confidence estimates are essential in semantic segmentation, especially in safety-critical settings where overconfident errors can mislead downstream decisions. Yet modern segmentation models often remain miscalibrated. Post-hoc calibration offers a practical way to correct confidence estimates without retraining the segmentation model, but its use in dense prediction raises structural issues that are often overlooked. We study two such issues. First, adding a constant to all logits leaves the softmax probabilities unchanged, but sever…
items.why_zh: 揭示了语义分割校准中的关键漏洞，对提升安全关键应用中的模型可靠性有重要意义。
items.why_en: It reveals critical calibration pitfalls in semantic segmentation, important for improving model reliability in safety-critical applications.

items.title_zh: HaloGuard 1.0：开源权重多语言AI安全宪法分类器
items.title_en: HaloGuard 1.0: An Open Weights Constitutional Classifier for Multilingual AI Safety
items.summary_zh: arXiv 论文发布 HaloGuard 1.0，一个开源权重的宪法分类器，用于输入安全检测。它在英文和多语言提示安全基准上达到最先进性能，模型大小仅为当前领先开源防护模型的十分之一。安全宪法由46条政策和2940个子类别组成，驱动合成数据生成，并采用一一配对的反事实样本保持主题和词汇不变。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2607.02079v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present HaloGuard 1.0, an open-weights implementation of the constitutional-classifier paradigm for input safety. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on English and multilingual prompt-safety benchmarks at roughly one-tenth the model size of current leading open guard models. The safety constitution is the organising structure of the corpus: a natural-language constitution of 46 policies and 2,940 subcategories drives synthetic data generation, with exhaustive one-to-one paired counterfactuals that hold topic and vocabulary fixed while…
items.why_zh: 提供高效、开源的多语言安全防护方案，显著降低模型大小同时保持高性能。
items.why_en: It offers an efficient, open-source multilingual safety guard with high performance at a fraction of the model size.

items.title_zh: 谱不平衡导致低秩持续适应中的遗忘
items.title_en: Spectral Imbalance Causes Forgetting in Low-Rank Continual Adaptation
items.summary_zh: arXiv 论文从知识分解角度研究参数高效持续学习中的遗忘问题。低秩适应表现出高度不平衡的奇异值谱：少数主导成分吸收大部分适应信息，而其他成分被忽略，导致遗忘。论文提出新视角，认为持续学习应关注更新本身如何自然保留知识，而非仅避免干扰。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.00722v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Parameter-efficient continual learning aims to adapt pre-trained models to sequential tasks without forgetting previously acquired knowledge. Most existing approaches treat continual learning as avoiding interference with past updates, rather than considering what properties make the current task-specific update naturally preserve previously acquired knowledge. From a knowledge-decomposition perspective, we observe that low-rank adaptations exhibit highly imbalanced singular value spectra: a few dominant components absorb most of the adaptati…
items.why_zh: 揭示了低秩持续学习中遗忘的根本原因，为设计更有效的持续学习方法提供新方向。
items.why_en: It uncovers the root cause of forgetting in low-rank continual learning, guiding more effective methods.

items.title_zh: 无遗忘的视听持续测试时适应
items.title_en: Audio-Visual Continual Test-Time Adaptation without Forgetting
items.summary_zh: arXiv 论文研究视听持续测试时适应问题，即在测试时持续适应未标注的非平稳域，其中单模态或双模态可能发生分布偏移。现有方法遭受灾难性遗忘，性能甚至低于源模型。论文首先分析问题，并提出新方法以避免遗忘。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.18528v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Audio-visual continual test-time adaptation involves continually adapting a source audio-visual model at test-time, to unlabeled non-stationary domains, where either or both modalities can be distributionally shifted, which hampers online cross-modal learning and eventually leads to poor accuracy. While previous works have tackled this problem, we find that SOTA methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting where the model's performance drops well below even the source model due to continual parameter updates at test-time. In this work, we firs…
items.why_zh: 解决了视听多模态测试时适应中的灾难性遗忘问题，对实际部署中的鲁棒性至关重要。
items.why_en: It tackles catastrophic forgetting in audio-visual test-time adaptation, crucial for robust deployment.

items.title_zh: 三星首款 AI 眼镜 Galaxy Glasses 爆料：1200 万摄像头、光致变色镜片
items.title_en: Samsung's First AI Glasses Galaxy Glasses Leak: 12MP Camera, Photochromic Lenses
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 3 日消息，科技媒体 Android Authority 昨日（7 月 2 日）发布博文， 分享了一段渲染视频，展示了三星首款 AI 眼镜 Galaxy Glasses ，其整体风格接近于 Meta x Ray-Ban 智能眼镜。 IT之家附上演示视频如下： 外观方面，三星 Galaxy Glasses 采用简约镜框，大部分元件集中在厚镜腿部分，整体佩戴体验更接近于传统太阳镜。 系统方面，三星 Galaxy Glasses 运行谷歌 Android XR 系统，并深度集成谷歌的 Gemini AI 模型，核心功能围绕免提 AI 交互展开，包括拍照、录像、语音问答、实时翻译、音乐播放及导航。 在硬件规格方面，该眼镜预计搭载一颗 12MP 摄像头、内置麦克风与扬声器、支持触控操作。此外为适合不同使用场景，光致变色镜片可随环境光线自动调节。 相关阅读： 《 三星首款 AI 眼镜 Galaxy Glasses 曝光：支持 Ring 戒指手势控制 》
items.summary_en: Samsung's Galaxy Glasses AI glasses leak shows a design similar to Meta x Ray-Ban, with Android XR and Gemini AI. Features include 12MP camera, photochromic lenses, and touch controls.
items.why_zh: 三星入局 AI 眼镜市场，与 Meta 竞争，可能推动智能眼镜普及。
items.why_en: Samsung enters the AI glasses market, competing with Meta and potentially driving adoption.

items.title_zh: 阿里达摩院：AI 智能体发现 4 种全新超导材料，已获实验验证
items.title_en: Alibaba DAMO Academy: AI Agent Discovers 4 New Superconducting Materials, Experimentally Verified
items.summary_zh: IT之家 7 月 3 日消息，阿里达摩院通过公众号宣布，7 月 3 日（今天），阿里达摩院联合中国人民大学、中国科学院大学等发布首个超导材料发现 AI 智能体 Elements Claw，预测出 6.8 万个可能的超导材料，其中 4 种全新材料已合成并证实存在超导性。相关数据已全部开放。 目前，国际主流超导数据库 SuperCon 历经数十年积累，仅收录约 2000 种材料。为此，阿里达摩院发挥 AI for Science 技术优势，联合中国人民大学、中国科学院大学等机构研发 ElementsClaw， 不仅可预测材料是否具有超导性，更能像人类材料学家一样查阅文献、评估合成可行性、设计实验方案 ，大幅提升材料发现效率和成功率。 据IT之家了解，ElementsClaw 采用“专通融合”架构。专有模型层面，团队基于 包含 1.25 亿个分子和晶体结构 的数据库，预训练出 1B 参数原子基础模型 Elements，判断材料是否具有超导性的 AUC 达 0.996，预测材料超导临界温度的平均误差在 1K 以内。通用智能体框架层面，ElementsClaw 实现了工具制造、流程编排、文献复核等整套自动化材料筛选流程，并能在文献中挖掘到新线索后“自我进化”。 AI 仅用 28 个 GPU 小时完成 240 万晶体结构筛选，预测出 6.8 万个超导候选材料。研究团队已实验合成并验证其中 4…
items.summary_en: Alibaba's Elements Claw AI agent predicted 68,000 potential superconductors, with 4 new ones experimentally verified. It uses a 1B-parameter atomic model trained on 125M structures, achieving 0.996 AUC and screening 2.4M structures in 28 GPU hours.
items.why_zh: AI 大幅加速超导材料发现，有望推动能源、量子计算等领域突破。
items.why_en: AI dramatically accelerates superconductor discovery, potentially advancing energy and quantum computing.

items.title_zh: 阿里达摩院：AI 智能体发现 4 种全新超导材料，已获实验验证
items.title_en: Alibaba DAMO Academy AI Agent Discovers 4 New Superconducting Materials, Experimentally Verified
